description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the monachus/hugo Docker image and sets the GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY variable to recursive. Add a pages job (default stage) that runs the command hugo --baseURL "https://maxwellbridges.gitlab.io/styleguide/", publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, and is limited to the master branch, deploying the site to GitLab Pages.
